chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6178 of 2022 Abdul Ghani Usman Versus Director General KDA & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 13.03.2025 Mr. Asif Rasheed for petitioner. Mr. Khursheed Jawed for K.D.A. Mr. Ali Safdar, Assistant Advocate General. -.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner would be satisfied if this Court makes a direction that his application for mutation of the subject property, which was filed and received by District Government, Revenue Group Land Management, KDA, Karachi on 24.06.2014, which is available on page 59 of the file, is decided by the K.D.A. in accordance with law within three months from the date of the order. Order accordingly. Copy of this order, along with copy of the application available at page 59 of the file, shall be sent to the Direct Land Management, K.D.A. Karachi, for compliance. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. Head of Const. Benches Judge
